key_quote: The core theoretical contributions are stated but unproven: PCL* has no convergence theorem, QCTL_F has no soundness proof, CoalCEGAR has no termination argument, and functor bandwidth has no formal definition.
rationale: All five reviewers acknowledge the novelty of coalgebraic LLM behavioral auditing. The coalgebraic framework, functor-parameterized abstraction lattice, and temporal verification framing are all recognized as genuinely innovative. If the theoretical proofs were complete and the error composition was rigorous, reviewers would not say 'not novel.' The primary blockers are unproven core theorems, missing end-to-end error analysis, and no PDFA+PRISM comparison — all depth/rigor issues. Category B.
